NEOW.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.0-1.char: I am already moving. It is the still who need waking.
NEOW.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.0-3.char: Then let it watch me stir the dead water.
NEOW.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.1-1.char: I remember. Nagakabouros does not favor half-finished paths.
NEOW.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.1-3.char: I will make it answer in broken stone.
NEOW.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.2-1.char: Only the still are remembered by the tower. My path is not finished.
DARV.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.0-0.ancient: Aha! A priestess of a god. Are you here to trade blessings, or to take my table?
DARV.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.0-1.char: I came to test. If a blessing cannot stand, it should break.
DARV.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.0-2.ancient: Excellent! Then you will enjoy my bargains. Most of them break.
DARV.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.1-0.ancient: Priestess, you return! Did my blessing stand, or did you smash it already?
DARV.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.1-1.char: What reaches this far is standing. What fails goes to the deep.
DARV.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.1-2.ancient: Ha! You make refunds sound like funerals.
DARV.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.1-3.char: Trials and funerals are only one step apart.
DARV.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.2-0.ancient: I think I understand you. You are not buying. You are weighing.
DARV.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.2-1.char: Souls, faith, choices. All of them have weight.
DARV.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.2-2.ancient: Then I had better make the price heavier!
NONUPEIPE.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.0-0.anci: Your steps are heavy. The tea will cool faster.
NONUPEIPE.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.0-1.char: Good. A weak road cannot bear a truth bearer.
NONUPEIPE.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.0-2.anci: Then sit first. Let the ripples in the cup judge your direction.
NONUPEIPE.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.0-3.char: If they stop, I will overturn the cup.
NONUPEIPE.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.1-0.anci: The leaves have changed three times. Your eyes still look like weather before a storm.
NONUPEIPE.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.1-1.char: A storm does not threaten. It makes ships move.
NONUPEIPE.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.1-2.anci: Then drink. Do not mistake the cup for a ship.
NONUPEIPE.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.1-3.char: So long as it does not pretend to be a harbor.
NONUPEIPE.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.2-0.anci: Every time you visit, the water keeps shaking.
NONUPEIPE.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.2-1.char: If calm cannot survive a footstep, it is only pretending to sleep.
NONUPEIPE.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.2-2.anci: Then this tea should wake up too.
TANX.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.0-0.ancient: [b]Priestess! You carry weapons that move? Let them fight me![/b]
TANX.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.0-1.char: Tentacles are not weapons. They are the hands of divine will.
TANX.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.0-2.ancient: [b]Hands can make fists! Come, let us see who falls first![/b]
TANX.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.0-3.char: [i][font_size=22]Illaoi sets her idol down hard, and the ground trembles.[/font_size][/i]
TANX.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.0-4.ancient: [b]Good! That sound is like a war drum![/b]
TANX.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.1-0.ancient: [b]Priestess! The last quake is still ringing in my bones![/b]
TANX.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.1-1.char: Then you are alive. If you are alive, keep being tested.
TANX.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.1-2.ancient: [b]Ha! Good! I like people who make greetings sound like challenges![/b]
TANX.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.2-0.ancient: [b]You again! This time let your god and my fists sing together![/b]
TANX.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.2-1.char: If you can follow Her rhythm, do not stop.
TANX.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.2-2.char: [i][font_size=22]Tentacles carve tide-shaped arcs across the ground.[/font_size][/i]
OROBAS.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.0-0.ancient: Wow! Do those things behind you think for themselves, or do you think for them?
OROBAS.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.0-1.char: They answer Nagakabouros. I only drag cowards into the tide.
OROBAS.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.0-2.ancient: Orobas discovers! The tide must have many interesting teeth!
OROBAS.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.0-3.char: The teeth do not matter. The strength of the bite does.
OROBAS.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.0-4.ancient: Then Orobas wants the strongest one!
OROBAS.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.1-0.ancient: Orobas thought about it! If tentacles are divine will, can divine will tickle?
OROBAS.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.1-1.char: It would seize the thought of running from you first.
OROBAS.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.1-2.ancient: Then Orobas will hide the thought of running!
OROBAS.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.1-3.char: You cannot hide it. The soul speaks first.
OROBAS.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.2-0.ancient: Orobas discovers again! Every time you visit, your shadows are more numerous.
OROBAS.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.2-1.char: They are markers left by trials.
OROBAS.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.2-2.ancient: Then Orobas will follow the markers. From far away!
PAEL.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.0-0.ancient: [thinky_dots]Flesh melts, bone softens. Come, let a piece of me move with you...[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.0-1.char: Weak flesh does not move people forward. It only gives them excuses.
PAEL.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.0-2.ancient: [thinky_dots]Then choose a piece that makes none.[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.1-0.ancient: [thinky_dots]You return carrying the sound of tides. My body remembers your steps...[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.1-1.char: Memory is not enough. Only what changes is alive.
PAEL.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.1-2.ancient: [thinky_dots]Then take a piece that still changes.[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.2-0.ancient: [thinky_dots]The tower devours many names, but not yours.[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.2-2.ancient: [thinky_dots]Good. Let my old flesh move once more.[/thinky_dots]
TEZCATARA.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.0-0.anci: Oh, child of the sea. Come warm yourself. Fire dries away unnecessary pain.
TEZCATARA.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.0-1.char: Pain is not unnecessary. It reminds people not to stop.
TEZCATARA.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.0-2.anci: Then take something warm. Walk with pain, and with strength.
TEZCATARA.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.1-0.anci: Your idol looks cold. Should I put a little fire under it too?
TEZCATARA.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.1-1.char: It does not need fire. It needs people willing to face fire.
TEZCATARA.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.1-2.anci: Heh. Then I will make the fire brighter.
TEZCATARA.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.2-0.anci: You enter like a storm every time. My stove has learned to duck.
TEZCATARA.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.2-1.char: A fire that ducks cannot forge a trial.
TEZCATARA.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.2-2.anci: Then it will not duck. Today's meal will be very hot.
VAKUU.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.0-0.ancient: Glory, fear, desire. Mortals always give chains beautiful names.
VAKUU.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.0-1.char: A chain is a chain. If a trial can tear it apart, it was never glory.
VAKUU.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.0-2.ancient: Good. Let me see whether your god praises breaking, too.
VAKUU.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.1-0.ancient: You do not make wishes of me, priestess. You stare only at the price.
VAKUU.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.1-1.char: A wish that will not face its price is a lie.
VAKUU.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.1-2.ancient: Then we can discuss an honest bargain.
VAKUU.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.2-0.ancient: Your name echoes through the tower. But a name can become a cage.
VAKUU.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.2-1.char: Only those who stop are trapped by names.
VAKUU.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.2-2.ancient: Then keep walking. Even demons enjoy watching a cage door kicked open.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.0-0r: [red]Illaoi[/red]. You dragged a god of the deep to the tower's crown, yet still do not understand why it must stand still.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.0-1r: Stillness is death. Nagakabouros demands motion.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.0-3r: Then let the fractures become a tide. Come, Architect.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.1-0r: [red]Illaoi[/red], your god only demands faith. My tower gives answers.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.1-1r: An answer that cannot survive a test is only a chain.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.1-3r: No. I would make you move.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.2-0r: You tear souls loose and call it mercy?
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.2-2r: Then what do you see in me?
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.2-3r: A heart afraid the tide will prove it hollow.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.3-0r: Every stone, every door, obeys my design.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.3-1r: Then the tentacles will break them first.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.3-2r: You mistake chaos for divine will.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.ILLAOI_CHARACTER.3-3r: I mistake stagnation for an enemy.
